entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The sovereign nation where the discussed initiatives and GI frameworks are implemented

entities.name: GEOGRAPHICAL INDICATIONS
entities.description: Legal protections for products that have a specific geographical origin and possess qualities or a reputation due to that origin

entities.name: MAKE IN INDIA
entities.description: A government initiative designed to encourage the manufacturing of products within India

entities.name: VOCAL FOR LOCAL
entities.description: A campaign to promote the use and development of indigenous and local products

entities.name: ATMANIRBHAR BHARAT
entities.description: A strategic vision to make India a self-reliant nation

entities.name: TRADITIONAL KNOWLEDGE
entities.description: The knowledge and practices developed by indigenous and local communities over generations

entities.name: CULTURAL RELICS
entities.description: Physical artifacts and heritage items that represent India's cultural history

entities.name: GI HOLDERS
entities.description: Entities or individuals who possess the legal registration and rights to a Geographical Indication

entities.name: GI AUTHORISED USERS
entities.description: Persons or entities permitted to use a registered Geographical Indication for their products

entities.name: GI ECOSYSTEM
entities.description: The network of stakeholders, including producers, regulators, and supporting bodies, involved in the GI framework

entities.name: GI COMMUNITIES
entities.description: Local groups of producers who maintain the standards and production of GI-certified goods

entities.name: ARTISAN GROUPS
entities.description: Collectives of skilled craftspeople producing traditional, GI-protected handicrafts

entities.name: FARMER GROUPS
entities.description: Collectives of agricultural producers growing GI-protected crops or livestock

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL GIS
entities.description: Geographical Indications specifically applied to agricultural products and their origins

entities.name: SOUTHERN INDIA
entities.description: The geographical region in the southern part of India noted for its agricultural GIs

entities.name: GOVERNMENT BODIES
entities.description: Official state organizations responsible for the administration and promotion of the GI system

entities.name: NGOS
entities.description: Non-governmental organizations providing support and advocacy for GI communities and holders

entities.name: GI REGISTRATION
entities.description: The formal administrative process of certifying a product as a Geographical Indication

entities.name: INDIGENOUS GOODS
entities.description: Products that are native to a specific region and produced using local methods
